name: io.github.kemalabuteliyte.domain-whois-mcp
description: Domain WHOIS & RDAP lookups via native protocols. Check availability, get registrar info, bulk check up to 50 domains, discover TLD infrastructure — all via IANA, zero API keys needed.

tools.name: whois_lookup
tools.description: Full WHOIS lookup via native TCP protocol with referral following and structured parsing

tools.name: rdap_lookup
tools.description: RDAP lookup returning structured JSON registration data

tools.name: domain_check
tools.description: Check if a domain is available for registration (RDAP first, WHOIS fallback)

tools.name: bulk_domain_check
tools.description: Check up to 50 domains concurrently with configurable parallelism

tools.name: tld_info
tools.description: Get TLD information from IANA including WHOIS/RDAP server assignments

tools.name: whois_raw
tools.description: Send raw WHOIS queries to any server (domains, IPs, ASNs)

tools.name: find_whois_server
tools.description: Discover WHOIS and RDAP servers for any domain or TLD

tools.name: rdap_bootstrap_info
tools.description: Browse IANA RDAP bootstrap data — which TLDs support RDAP
